nodes.name: Glistening-green tanager
nodes.summary: The glistening-green tanager (Chlorochrysa phoenicotis) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Colombia and Ecuador. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. Males are almost entirely bright glistening emerald green, with small gray patches behind and below the eye with another on the shoulders. Females are slightly duller than males. References
nodes.shortSummary: The glistening-green tanager (Chlorochrysa phoenicotis) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Colombia and Ecuador.

nodes.name: Chlorochrysa
nodes.summary: Chlorochrysa（Chlorochrysa）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Glistening-green tanager、Orange-eared tanager、Multicoloured tanager。
